title: Subscribe button point — see you next time
negativePrompt: extra people, duplicate character, twin, clone, two of the same person, mirrored figure, background extras, third child, second sister
prompt: Medium two-shot in @Livingroom. @Sara on the LEFT and @Eva on the RIGHT both pointing down toward the bottom of the camera (where the YouTube subscribe button would be), big smiles. @Sara: "Click subscribe down there!" @Eva: "See you next time! Bye-bye!"
